| `draw_range_60m` | draw_range | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | Total price-path excursion over the trailing 60 minutes: max draw-down (|deepest fall below the running peak|) plus max draw-up (highest rise above the running trough), each a fraction of price. A sign-symmetric realized round-trip range capturing path roughness a variance misses (a forward-vol/burst precursor; batch-4 screen fwd-RV IC +0.81, z 267). Null on a window with fewer than two closes. |
| `max_drawdown_60m` | draw_range | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | Max draw-down magnitude over the trailing 60 minutes — how far the close fell below its window-running peak (max adverse excursion), a non-negative fraction of price. The adverse leg of draw_range. Null on a window with fewer than two closes. |
| `max_drawup_60m` | draw_range | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | Max draw-up over the trailing 60 minutes — the highest the close rose above its window-running trough (max favorable excursion), a non-negative fraction of price. The favorable leg of draw_range. Null on a window with fewer than two closes. |
| `dumper_bounce_from_low` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-0.5, 5.0) | Bounce so far: last close / running min-low-since-open - 1 (>=0; the intraday recovery as it develops — dumpers close a median +8.7% off the low). |
| `dumper_early_drop` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-1.0, 1.0) | Running max drop off the prior close since the session open: 1 - min(low so far)/prev_close. At/after 10:00 ET this equals the first-30-min early_drop the dumper study used. |
| `dumper_gap_open` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-1.0, 5.0) | Overnight gap leg: session open / prior close - 1 (typically negative for a dumper). |
| `dumper_in_band` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Int8 | warmup | (0.0, 1.0) | 1 if prior close is in the small-cap band [$2,$20], else 0. |
| `dumper_is_active` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Int8 | warmup | (0.0, 1.0) | 1 if dumper_in_band AND dumper_early_drop >= 0.30 (the small-cap-crash regime flag), else 0. |
| `dumper_log_dollar_vol` | dumper_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | log1p of cumulative dollar volume (sum of close*volume) since the session open — the crash-day liquidity / participation so far. |

| `gap_extended` | gap_fill_state | price | A | tolerance | Int8 | warmup | (0.0, 1.0) | 1 if the gap has EXTENDED past the open (gap_fill_fraction < 0, i.e. momentum) at this minute, else 0. NULL on a zero-gap day. |
| `gap_fill_fraction` | gap_fill_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-5.0, 5.0) | Fraction of the overnight gap filled by this minute: (close - session_open)/(prev_close - session_open). 0 at the open, 1.0 = back to prev_close (filled), <0 = extended past the open. NULL on a zero-gap day. |
| `p10_inter_arrival_ms_1m` | inter_arrival | microstructure | C | distributional | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, None) | Tenth-percentile within-minute inter-trade gap in milliseconds (the fast tail of arrivals — small means bursty). Null on a minute with fewer than two trades. |
| `rapid_fire_ratio_1m` | inter_arrival | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0) | Fraction of within-minute inter-trade gaps shorter than 100 ms — a rapid-fire / HFT burst proxy. In [0, 1]; null on a minute with fewer than two trades (no gap exists). |
| `trade_timing_entropy_1m` | inter_arrival | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0001) | Normalized Shannon entropy of the trade-count distribution across the minute's one-second buckets, in [0, 1]: 1 is activity spread evenly over the seconds it touched, near 0 is clustered into few seconds. Null on a tradeless minute. |
| `absret_vs_tod` | intraday_seasonality | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, None) | This minute's |close/open-1| divided by the typical |return| for this time-of-day bucket (the frozen intraday-seasonality baseline). >1 = a bigger move than normal for this clock. NULL outside RTH / unmapped bucket. |
| `volume_vs_tod` | intraday_seasonality | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, None) | This minute's volume divided by (the name's running since-open mean volume * the time-of-day volume-shape factor). >1 = more volume than this name's typical minute scaled to this time of day. NULL outside RTH / unmapped bucket. |
| `large_print_ratio_1m` | large_print_burst | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0) | Fraction of this minute's trades whose size is at least 4x the minute's own mean print size — a relative-to-own-scale large-print burst (vol-burst study, OOS ROC-AUC up to 0.92). Count-weighted, in [0, 1]; null on a tradeless or zero-mean-size minute. |
| `large_print_volume_share_1m` | large_print_burst | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0) | Share of this minute's traded volume that printed in large prints (size >= 4x the minute's mean print size) — how concentrated the minute's volume is in outsized prints. Volume-weighted, in [0, 1]; null on a tradeless or zero-volume minute. |
| `max_print_size_ratio_1m` | large_print_burst | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (1.0, None) | Largest single print this minute relative to the minute's mean print size (max size / mean size) — the peak outlier print, >= 1. Null on a tradeless or zero-mean-size minute. |

| `print_hhi_30m` | print_hhi | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0001) | Trailing 30-minute mean of the within-minute notional Herfindahl (Σ notional_i² / (Σ notional_i)² over the minute's prints) — how concentrated traded notional is in a few prints. Near 0 = spread evenly over many prints (broad participation, a vol-burst precursor; batch-3 screen z 12-27, fwd-vol IC −0.52), 1 = a single print. Null on a window with no trades. |
| `print_hhi_60m` | print_hhi | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.0001) | Trailing 60-minute mean of the within-minute notional Herfindahl (Σ notional_i² / (Σ notional_i)² over the minute's prints) — how concentrated traded notional is in a few prints. | `range_expansion_10_60m` | range_expansion | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | Ratio of the trailing 10-minute mean intrabar high-low range ((high-low)/close) to the trailing 60-minute mean — recent range relative to the longer trailing range. > 1 means range is expanding (vol-of-vol onset, a stable vol-burst precursor in the batch-3 screen, z 5-15), < 1 contracting. Null on warmup or a zero trailing-range window. |
| `range_expansion_5_30m` | range_expansion | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | Ratio of the trailing 5-minute mean intrabar high-low range ((high-low)/close) to the trailing 30-minute mean — recent range relative to the longer trailing range. > 1 means range is expanding (vol-of-vol onset, a stable vol-burst precursor in the batch-3 screen, z 5-15), < 1 contracting. Null on warmup or a zero trailing-range window. |
| `realized_range_10m` | realized_range | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, 5.0) | Trailing 10-minute mean of the intra-minute high-low range as a fraction of close ((high-low)/close) — short-window realized range (the burst study's rv3). A bar-clearing driver of imminent large moves (vol-burst study, OOS ROC-AUC up to 0.92). |
| `realized_range_3m` | realized_range | volatility | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, 5.0) | Trailing 3-minute mean of the intra-minute high-low range as a fraction of close ((high-low)/close) — short-window realized range (the burst study's rv3). A bar-clearing driver of imminent large moves (vol-burst study, OOS ROC-AUC up to 0.92). |

| `dist_to_half_dollar` | round_levels | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | none | (0.0, 0.26) | Absolute distance from the close to the nearest half dollar (x.00 or x.50), in dollars (0 to 0.25). |
| `dist_to_round_dollar` | round_levels | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | none | (0.0, 0.51) | Absolute distance from the close to the nearest whole dollar, in dollars (0 to 0.5). |
| `is_at_round_dollar` | round_levels | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | none | (-0.01, 1.01) | 1.0 when the close is within 2 cents of a whole dollar, else 0.0 (round-number cluster). |
| `runner_early_move` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-1.0, 30.0) | Running max gain off the prior close since the session open: max(high so far)/prev_close - 1. At/after 10:00 ET this equals the first-30-min early_move the runner study used. |
| `runner_gap_open` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-1.0, 30.0) | Overnight gap leg: session open / prior close - 1. |
| `runner_in_band` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Int8 | warmup | (0.0, 1.0) | 1 if prior close is in the small-cap runner band [$2,$20], else 0. |
| `runner_is_active` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Int8 | warmup | (0.0, 1.0) | 1 if runner_in_band AND runner_early_move >= 0.30 (the small-cap-runner regime flag), else 0. |
| `runner_log_dollar_vol` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (0.0, None) | log1p of cumulative dollar volume (sum of close*volume) since the session open — the runner-day liquidity / participation so far. |
| `runner_pullback_from_high` | runner_state | price | A | tolerance | Float64 | warmup | (-1.0, 0.5) | Give-back so far: last close / running max-high-since-open - 1 (<=0; the fade signal as it develops — runners close a median -17.8% off the high). |

| `sector_beta_30m` | sector_beta | cross_sectional | A | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (-15.0, 15.0) | Rolling beta to THIS ticker's GICS sector over 30m: slope of its one-minute return regressed on its sector's equal-weight one-minute return (NULL for unmapped-sector names). |

In [0, ln 6 ≈ 1.79]: 0 = all prints one size scale, high = a dispersed mix of odd-lots and blocks (information-driven trading, a vol-burst precursor; batch-3 screen z 27-30, fwd-vol IC +0.67). Null on a window with no trades. |
| `size_entropy_60m` | size_entropy | microstructure | C | tolerance | Float64 | sparse | (0.0, 1.8) | Shannon entropy (nats) of the trailing 60-minute trade-SIZE distribution over 6 order-of-magnitude size bins (floor(log10(size)) clipped to [0,5]): −Σ p_b ln p_b. | `dc_xscale_setup_long_count` | swing_dc | trend_quality | A | tolerance | Float64 | none | (0.0, 4.0) | How many scales currently fire the golden-zone long-continuation setup (multi-scale agreement = the high-conviction 'beginning of a likely-up chunk' read). |
